GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is used to calculate the results of a finished challenge and update the challenge record. It is intended for use by managers.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: - if the Challenge status is Finished or the endDate is passed, calculate the results on the objective by following this steps: 2.1 Identify the users participating to the challenge by using the action "Get Users from List" on the field Partipants. If Roles are given, identify the users by using the action "Get Users from role" 2.2 Retreive the Closed and Won opportunities that have a Close date between the start date and the end date of the challenge for each user by using the action "Get Opportunities" 2.3 Calculate the results of each users on the challenge by using the information in the Description field of the challenge. 2.4 Write a message for sharing the results 2.5 Always Send a slack message to the manager for confirming the results and the message by using the action "Send a Slack Direct Message" 2.6 When the manager confirmed to proceed, Send a message to the Challenge Slack channel using the id on the Slack channel field and the action "Send Slack Message to Channel" 2.7 Update the challenge Results record with the list of users and their score. Always write only the list with no other sentence by using the action "Create or Update challenge"

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is only to calculate the results of Finished challenges and update the corresponding challenge records.
